title: Update: Fire contained in Barandas, Uniondale
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The mountain fire in the...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The mountain fire in the Barandas area, Uniondale, has been successfully contained and extinguished.


> The deployed helicopter made a significant impact and successfully extinguished the fire.


Garden Route District Municipality and CapeNature are on scene and will continue to monitor the area.If you spot a veld or wildfire, please report it immediately to the GRDM Emergency Call Centre at 044 805 5071 or via WhatsApp at 081 709 5193.

Previous article:  Helicopter deployed as wildfire erupts in Uniondale Mountains

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
